status: CONDITIONAL -- certified-census discharge MODULO two computed clauses (FOLD, FLOOR-PERSIST) plus one monitored constant (C'-CAP). (LAM-BOX) is DISCHARGED-conditional by gate LAM-INV (proved invariant intervals for lam/Lambda^+/Lambda^-, full mode only -- see discharged_clauses.LAM_BOX below); (SIB-BAND) is DISCHARGED at a deep anchor by gate SIB-CERT (geometric-center certified census, GIVEN (LAM-BOX) -- see discharged_clauses.SIB_BAND below). Composed equilibrium chain PROVED (sufficiency); load-bearing gates V15-IA/V17-IA are exact-Fraction interval-arithmetic censuses of the FORCED-PROPORTIONAL surrogate at the shallow anchor (J0*=500, f*=99/100); gate SIB-CERT separately certifies the REAL non-proportional cascade at the deep anchor (J0_SIB=800, PAD_SIB=999/1000). ROUND 2 (PI review, same day as SIB-CERT): corrected a boundary-slot gap -- the wobble censuses' i=16 row reads x=w_17, one index past the IH's i<17 window; w_17 now gets its own (LAM-BOX)-class deep box, monitored by MAG-BOX (see discharged_clauses.SIB_BAND.boundary_slot). ROUND 3 (this revision, LAM-INV): (LAM-BOX) upgraded from measured+padded (gate MAG-BOX) to PROVED invariant intervals (gate LAM-INV); the Lambda^+ floor is WIDENED -1.16 -> -1.17 (R1 mitigation (b)); every consumer census re-run over the wider box (V15-IA unaffected -- theta_band does not depend on Lambda^+/-, confirmed bit-identical; V17-IA margin 11.0% -> 10.9%; SIB-CERT margin unchanged +7.4% to displayed precision). Clause count after round 3: two open (FOLD, FLOOR-PERSIST) plus one monitored constant (C'-CAP). ROUND 4 (this revision): (C'-CAP) DISCHARGED-conditional -- R1 mitigation (a) carried out: gate LAM-INV now PROVES C' <= CPRIME=3/500 at every NG grid node (certified worst 0.004245, 29% margin, locus t=0.5) via the exact drop identity Lambda_true-Lambda_pure = [gbar*Lambda_pure - C'/P]/(1-gbar) with per-branch floor-box data and the (FOLD)-folded equilibrium ceiling from the UNTAMPERED memoized V15-IA/V17-IA chain; the a-posteriori monitor is RETAINED as cross-check. (FLOOR-PERSIST) becomes FIRST-CLASS MONITORED: new core gate FLOOR-DRIFT checks the drift mechanism (123 parameters, deep-grid pairs, worst step ratio 1.00005212) and the exact as-consumed floor margins at both anchors (1.010070 at (500,99/100); 1.000989 at (800,999/1000)); its census-discharge route is CLOSED as a route-cut (box-worst output-ratio/floor 0.579, 697/738 rows fail at (500,99/100); 0.568, 738/738 at (800,999/1000) -- note Section 9(v)). Clause count: two open computed clauses (FOLD, FLOOR-PERSIST), ZERO monitored-only literals. No prior gate value changed (theta_band/F_box/SIB-CERT bit-identical; the new work only ADDS checks).
claim: (PROP-TAIL) (#885's single residual scalar: rho_prop@i<17(n) <= 1.02560749 for all n) is discharged as a certified-census theorem MODULO the computed clauses below, via the deep-base equilibrium chain: an exact reduction lemma + an exact spectral gap + a certified one-step recursion + a joint induction, closed by the R-a route (deep-base constant forcing) at the shipped anchor (J0*, f*, theta*) = (500, 99/100, theta_band). theta_band is gate V15-IA's certified band-uniform seminorm bound over the certified LC ratio box (lam-minced enclosure); F_box is gate V17-IA's exact-Fraction minced-IA forcing census. BOTH certify the forced-proportional surrogate c^+ = lam*c^- at this shallow anchor -- the real non-proportional cascade is covered by gate SIB-CERT's geometric-center wobble census at a deep anchor (J0_SIB=800, PAD_SIB=999/1000), which DISCHARGES the (SIB-BAND) clause given (LAM-BOX) (see discharged_clauses.SIB_BAND). The magnitude box [lam,Lambda^+,Lambda^-] both V15-IA/V17-IA box-max over is itself now PROVED as an invariant-interval enclosure by gate LAM-INV (an exact windowed-mass-recursion identity + a Birkhoff mass-field enclosure + a coupled Lambda-field enclosure, DERIV_LAMBOX.md), DISCHARGING the (LAM-BOX) clause conditional on the floor box, the finite base-case census, and an a-posteriori Lipschitz self-check (see discharged_clauses.LAM_BOX); the correction-derivative cap (C'-CAP) that recursion drops is itself PROVED by a floor-box node census (this revision, see discharged_clauses.C_PRIME_CAP). The arithmetic fact rho_prop@i<17(n) <= 1.02560749 is supported with margin by every gate.
headline: the discharge holds as a certified-census theorem modulo the enumerated computed clauses

Lemmas W1-W3 (window bookkeeping): read-set PROVED; the <=57/50 fold is a grid-measured COMPUTED bound (FOLD clause)

arithmetic slot: v_n <= tau* for n > J* -- via R-a (gates F3 + V15-IA + V17-IA): F_box(500,99/100)=0.02687612 <= (1-theta_band)*tau*=0.03018857, 11.0% margin (exact-Fraction compare)
slot closed (for the proportional surrogate): rho_prop@i<17(n) <= TARGET for all n>=500

constants.tau_star_fraction_lower_bound: 75855330599169/1000000000000000 = 0.075855330599169 (certified <= 3*ln(TARGET) via 50-digit Decimal ln; used exactly in both the threshold and the ceiling comparison, both conservative under an under-estimate)

theta_band_certified.method: gate V15-IA: the Lemma A1 tangent seminorm over the certified LC ratio box, folded by 57/50. The sup over the magnitude scalar lam in [0.72,0.95] is enclosed by MINCING lam into LAM_MINCE=24 panels and taking each Moebius-in-lam matrix entry's exact per-panel range (hull of its two panel-endpoint values combined with the (a,b) 2-point extremization), then the seminorm by interval subtraction. NOT an endpoint-sufficiency claim: the seminorm is a sum of |differences of Moebius functions with different denominators|, degree-(2,2) in lam, not Moebius, so it can have an interior-lam maximum; mincing is the rigorous enclosure. A consistency check requires theta_band >= the realized-profile seminorm (a valid upper bound must dominate the realized value).
theta_band_certified.certifies: the FORCED-PROPORTIONAL surrogate c^+ = lam*c^- (see sib_band). Lambda-invariant seminorm with Lambda^pm = the WINDOW-MEAN (zero-sum delta requirement).
theta_band_certified.outward_slop: 1e-9, plus round_up_frac to a printable Fraction (outward/conservative)
theta_band_certified.lam_inv_note: CONFIRMED UNCHANGED after this revision's Lambda^+ floor widening (-1.16 -> -1.17): theta_band depends only on lam and the LC ratio box, never on Lambda^+/Lambda^- (structural, not coincidental -- see the tangent seminorm's Lambda-shift-invariance, Section 3/5 of the note). Re-run value: 0.6020244, bit-identical.

f_box_certified.method: gate V17-IA: exact-Fraction, width-2-locality minced interval arithmetic over every index i=0..16's marginal range (not merely the two window endpoints), box-maxed over the sibling-proportionality magnitude parameters (lam, Lambda^+, Lambda^-). Certifies the forced-proportional surrogate.
f_box_certified.outward_slop: 1e-9 (documented, printed; six orders past the cascade's ~1e-15 relative float error)
f_box_certified.threshold_formula: (1-theta_band)*tau*, theta_band=0.6020244 (gate V15-IA), tau* the exact-Fraction lower bound; comparison is exact Fraction
f_box_certified.widening_note: re-run after the Lambda^+ floor widening (-1.16 -> -1.17, R1 mitigation (b)): F_box rose 0.02687612 -> 0.02690175 (+0.0000256, <0.1% relative), margin fell 11.0% -> 10.9% (-0.1 percentage point) -- 'well under 1%' as predicted, since only the Lamp box-max corner shifted, not theta_band.

equilibrium_ceiling.reads: F_box/(1-theta_band)=0.06759647 <= tau*=0.07585533 => sup_{n>=500} V_17(n) <= 0.06759647 => log rho_prop@i<17(n) <= 0.02253216 < ln(TARGET)=0.02528511 => rho_prop@i<17(n) <= exp(0.02253216)=1.022788 < TARGET, for all n>=500 -- for the FORCED-PROPORTIONAL surrogate; extension to the real cascade is discharged by gate SIB-CERT (see discharged_clauses.SIB_BAND). Post-widening re-run values (previously 0.06753207/0.02251069/1.022766).

FLOOR_PERSIST.route_cut: the natural discharge -- a V12-style pointwise corner census of one-step output ratios over the floor box -- is REFUTED (note Section 9(v)): box-worst r_i-prime/floor = 0.579 at (500,99/100), 697/738 rows fail; 0.568 at (800,999/1000), 738/738 fail. The box has no mechanism coupling input-floor slack to output-floor slack; persistence is a property of the realized trajectory (the upward CLT drift), not of the certified box. Reproduced as an INFORMATIONAL negative control on the FLOOR-DRIFT gate line.

discharged_clauses.note: Clauses whose discharge is itself a computed-census fact resting on a named gate (recorded here, not in computed_clauses): (LAM-BOX) by gate LAM-INV, (SIB-BAND) by gate SIB-CERT, and -- this revision -- (C_PRIME_CAP) by LAM-INV's floor-box node census.

LAM_BOX.asserts: (as before discharge) both load-bearing gates box-max the seminorm/forcing over a fixed magnitude box -- lam in [0.72,0.95], Lambda^+ in [-1.16,-0.82], Lambda^- in [-0.66,-0.35] -- which was a MEASURED+PADDED range (six silent literals), not a proved interval.
LAM_BOX.discharged_by: gate LAM-INV (full mode only): two PROVED identities (I1 the exact windowed mass recursion, I2 the Lambda log-derivative identity) plus a Birkhoff mass-field one-pass invariance check (NG=3841 grid, sc_exact ray-normalization since the pure a-operator grows S by a dominant-eigenvalue-like factor -- Birkhoff-contracting to a RAY not a fixed point -- GMAX-tolerance comparison) plus a coupled Lambda-field one-pass invariance check (CPRIME-tolerance comparison) plus a-posteriori Lipschitz self-checks (sup|Lambda|<=LIP_S, sup|Lambda'|<=LIP_L) plus a floor-box-PROVED bound gamma<=GMAX. Conditional on the existing floor box (F3), the existing finite base-case census (MAG-BOX/V18), the a-posteriori Lipschitz self-check, and one monitored constant (C'-CAP, see computed_clauses.C_PRIME_CAP).

identities.I1_exact_windowed_mass_recursion: sum_{i<W}(K_d*c)_i = a(t)*M_w(c) - (1/4)(c_0-c_1) - (1/4)(c_{W-1}-c_W), W=OPWIN=17. PROVED (telescoping conv_even's own definition); verified EXACTLY in Fraction arithmetic by gate LAM-INV's own live spot-check (residual=0 over 12 (n,t,branch) points, full-mode run) and independently by the lab lane (LAB_LAMBOX.md Q2, residual=0, 40 checks). E_W reads c_17, one past the operative i<17 window, only via rc_16 in [f_16,1], F3-certified over i<18 -- no new hypothesis.
identities.I2_lambda_log_derivative: Lambda^pm_mass = (log S^17)'(t_pm), S^17(s):=sum_{i<17} c_i(G(s)) -- window-generic identity instantiated at W=17=OPWIN, matching I1 and the gamma/C-prime covers (window-coherence fix, round 4; was cited at W=18). PROVED (elementary algebraic identity: L_i c_i = c_i' by definition, sum_i L_i c_i = d/dt sum_i c_i); confirmed to 1e-11 by finite-difference cross-check in the derivation lane.

gate_result_full_mode_run.cprime_measured_magbox_note: gate MAG-BOX ALSO cross-checks the realized-vs-field C' consistency at its OWN 6 grid levels x 41 parents (broader than this gate's own sparse one-anchor sample) -- worst 0.0027 (W=17 field object, round-4 window coherence), still comfortably <= CPRIME=0.006; computed once (this gate runs first in compute(), memoized in _LAMINV_CACHE) and reused by both gates, no double cost.
gate_result_full_mode_run.note: all gaps are POSITIVE (PASS): the one-pass invariance checks hold with room (GMAX/CPRIME dominate the between-grid discretization residual, which is 2-3 orders of magnitude smaller -- additive field-padding was tried and found counterproductive, see the verifier's module comment above gate_lam_inv).

risk_register.R1: the load-bearing Lambda^+ floor. At the original box floor -1.16, proved headroom is razor-thin (+0.00044) and FAILS at 2x the measured correction-derivative bound (CPRIME=0.008 -> proved Lambda^+_lo ~-1.1626 < -1.16, confirmed live by tamper laminv-floor).
risk_register.mitigation_b_TAKEN: widen the Lambda^+ floor -1.16 -> -1.17 (0.86% widening). Every consumer re-run: V15-IA UNAFFECTED (theta_band bit-identical, 0.6020244 -- structurally independent of Lambda^+/-); V17-IA margin 11.0% -> 10.9% (-0.1pp); SIB-CERT margin +7.4% -> +7.4% (unchanged to displayed precision); MAG-BOX headroom against Lambda^+_mass 0.0172 -> ~0.0271. Proved headroom against the widened floor: +0.0104, comfortable.
risk_register.mitigation_a_OPEN: the exact floor-box bound on C' = d/ds[(1/4)(Delta_0+E_W)]. Would discharge (C'-CAP) and remove the last conditional content from (LAM-BOX). Measured impact 0.0013-0.002 against the real cascade; not yet derived from the floor box.

LAM_BOX.label: DISCHARGED-conditional (proved invariant intervals, gate LAM-INV, full mode only), conditional on the floor box + finite base-case census + a-posteriori Lipschitz self-check + one monitored constant (C'-CAP)
LAM_BOX.window_coherence_fix_round4: Round-3 text cited (I2) at W=18 while (I1)/gamma/spot-check are at W=17=OPWIN, and the C-prime monitor + MAG-BOX field consistency compared the field against the 18-window mass-weighted Lambda -- one edge term of slippage between the certified invariance argument and the monitored realized object. Fixed this revision: (I2) restated window-generic, instantiated at W=17; onestep_compose emits Lamp17/Lamm17; both monitors compare against the W=17 object; MAG-BOX monitors the W=17 variants in-box alongside the retained W=18 mass and arithmetic-mean variants. Numerically small, all boxes re-verified green; the (C_PRIME_CAP) node census is derived at W=17 throughout. See note Section 10.

SIB_BAND.asserts: (as before discharge) the load-bearing gates V15-IA/V17-IA certify only the forced-proportional surrogate c^+=lam*c^-; the real non-proportional cascade (c^+_i=lam*w_i*c^-_i, per-entry sibling wobble w_i by the IH rho_prop<=R*) is covered by the extension only if the wobble-enlarged census clears.
SIB_BAND.discharged_by: gate SIB-CERT: the GEOMETRIC-CENTER LEMMA (lam_gc:=sqrt(min_i rho_i*max_i rho_i) is itself a legal (LAM-BOX) point since both factors are, by (LAM-BOX); w_i:=rho_i/lam_gc then lies in [1/sqrt(R*),sqrt(R*)] by the IH alone, for i<17 -- no assumption beyond (LAM-BOX)) re-run at a deep anchor, where the census clears. round 2 (PI review): the lemma's IH covers i<17 only; the census's single out-of-window slot (i=16 row's x, i.e. w_17) is discharged separately via boundary_slot below, a (LAM-BOX)-class box MAG-BOX monitors on SIB-CERT's own operative domain.

C_PRIME_CAP.discharged_by: gate LAM-INV floor-box node census (this revision, R1 mitigation (a) carried out): the drop of the pure-operator Lambda recursion vs the true windowed-mass recursion obeys the EXACT identity Lambda_true - Lambda_pure = [gbar*Lambda_pure - C'/P]/(1-gbar) with gbar = C/P = sum_pm w_pm*gamma^pm ((I1) summed over branches; elementary). Bound, all outward, per NG node: gamma^pm <= G^pm(t_pm) (the same per-branch floor-box derivation as the PROVED gamma<=GMAX); |Lambda_pure| from the same 8-corner candidate enumeration as the invariance check (bilinear -> corner-sufficient); C'/P <= (1/3)[w G+ L+ + (1-w) G- L-] + (1/12) V18c [(w/a+_lo)(2/Q+) + ((1-w)/a-_lo)(2/Q-)] from Delta_0' = L_0 Delta_0 + c_1(L_0-L_1), E_W' = L_16 E_W + c_17(L_16-L_17), |L_i| <= |Lambda_child| + V18c, adjacent-index spreads <= V18c, (c_1+c_17)/S <= 2/Q, (Delta+E)/P = 4 gamma w, |dt_pm/dt| = 1/3. V18c := (57/50)*max(V_17(J0), F_box/(1-theta_band)) -- the (FOLD)-folded equilibrium ceiling, exact Fraction from the UNTAMPERED memoized V15-IA/V17-IA chain (tamper isolation). The cap is consumed ONLY at the NG grid nodes (between-grid coverage rides the existing LIP_S/LIP_L brackets), so the node census is exactly where the cap is needed. Joint induction acyclic per level: the pass n-1->n consumes H(n-1)'s V-ceiling and field membership; base n-1 in [48,J0) rides the existing base-case grid (same joint-IH shape as SIB-CERT's lemma consuming rho_prop).

scope.track: repo experimental-profile-ledger only: #880's |K|=1 dense-shell class-sum dichotomy and #885's INV-TAIL closure chain
scope.risk_limits: This packet makes no claim about, and is not on the critical path of, any separately submitted manuscript's conditionals (e.g. a paving-track ePrint submission and its own line-item conditionals). Those are a distinct obligation, entirely out of scope here; nothing in this packet's discharge chain, residual ladder, or consumer framing should be read as bearing on them.

discharge_note: This packet discharges (PROP-TAIL) as a certified-census theorem MODULO exactly two enumerated computed clauses (FOLD, FLOOR-PERSIST) -- zero monitored-only literals -- all gated green at the shipped anchor. (SIB-BAND) is DISCHARGED at a deep anchor (J0=800, pad=999/1000) by gate SIB-CERT's geometric-center wobble census, given (LAM-BOX). (LAM-BOX) itself is DISCHARGED-conditional (this revision) by gate LAM-INV's proved invariant intervals for lam/Lambda^+/Lambda^- -- no new assumption beyond the existing floor box, the existing finite base-case census, and an a-posteriori Lipschitz self-check; the (C'-CAP) cap that basis previously carried as a monitored constant is itself DISCHARGED-conditional (round 4) by the floor-box node census (see discharged_clauses.C_PRIME_CAP), and (FLOOR-PERSIST) is first-class monitored by gate FLOOR-DRIFT with its census-discharge route closed as a route-cut. The Lambda^+ floor is widened -1.16 -> -1.17 (R1 mitigation (b)); every consumer census re-run (V15-IA unaffected, V17-IA/SIB-CERT margins shrink by well under 1%). STATUS=CONDITIONAL: the load-bearing gates V15-IA/V17-IA certify the forced-proportional surrogate at the shallow anchor; SIB-CERT separately certifies the real, non-proportional cascade at the deep anchor; LAM-INV separately proves the magnitude box itself. R-b (sandwich) and R-c (sharp Edgeworth-1) remain OPEN STRENGTHENINGS toward the sharp C/n^2 law, not obligations; R1 mitigation (a) (the exact C' floor-box bound) remains open toward discharging (C'-CAP).
